name: Cardiac MRI
description: Cardiac MRI for comprehensive evaluation of cardiac anatomy, function, and tissue characterization

findings.technique: Cardiac MRI was performed with cine imaging, late gadolinium enhancement, and flow quantification sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Left Ventricle
sections.content: The left ventricle demonstrates [normal LVEF / preserved systolic function] with [X]% ejection fraction. The LV mass is [normal / not hypertrophied]. No regional wall motion abnormality.

sections.name: Right Ventricle
sections.content: The right ventricle demonstrates [normal RVEF / preserved systolic function] with [X]% ejection fraction. No RV dilatation or dysfunction.

sections.name: Myocardial Tissue
sections.content: The myocardial tissue demonstrates [no late gadolinium enhancement / no fibrosis / no infarction]. No myocardial edema or infiltration.

sections.name: Valves
sections.content: The aortic valve is [trileaflet / no stenosis / no regurgitation]. The mitral valve is [normal / no regurgitation / no prolapse].

sections.name: Coronary Arteries
sections.content: The coronary arteries demonstrate [no aneurysm / no anomalous origin / no flow abnormality] on MRA.

sections.name: Pericardium
sections.content: The pericardium is [intact / no thickening / no effusion / no constriction].

sections.name: Great Vessels
sections.content: The aorta is [normal in caliber / no dilation / no coarctation]. The pulmonary artery is [normal / no stenosis].

impression:
1. Normal cardiac MRI.
2. Normal biventricular systolic function.
3. No myocardial fibrosis or infarction.
